body:
This PR adds ObservationRecipe which gives a way to construct observations with seasonal noise covariance matrix or SVDplusD covariance matrix.

# TODO

- [x] Rename `SVDPlusDCovariance` to `SVDplusDCovariance`
- [x] Make a new release of ClimaAnalysis
- [x] Add skipping of tests depending on EKP version since tests currently rely on the main branch 
- [x] Check documentation and tests passed with new version of ClimaAnalysis
title: Add ObservationRecipe
